# novu_providers (Data Source)

Non exhaustive list of supported novu providers. The actual supported list is available in the novu go SDK doc: https://github.com/novuhq/novu-go/blob/main/docs/models/components/providersidenum.md
 If your provider is not in this list but is present in https://github.com/novuhq/novu-go/blob/main/docs/models/components/providersidenum.md, the terraform provider will not be able to use it until it is updated.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `items` (List of String) List of supported providers
